notes: Conservative v0.x floors. The seed corpus is small, so per-rule numbers are statistically noisy; only aggregate, micro-averaged floors are gated. minPrecision is the load-bearing false-flag guard and is set with margin below the current measured value so honest engine changes are not blocked by noise, while a genuine precision regression still trips it. Raise these floors as the corpus grows — a change to this file is reviewed, versioned data.
